DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-29-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS ANGELITA DENG, and, DAVID DENG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Appearances: Plaintiff Leo Sanders, appearing in Pro Per and opposing party; Alice M. Dostalova, Esq. of Wolfe & Wyman LLP (925) 280-0004 appearing for Defendants and Moving party. Argued and the Court adopted and modified its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer is sustained, no opposition filed, without leave to amend. Order signed in open Court.(302/EHG) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Court Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR# 7489
